title: Exactly Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Insufficient check in DebtManager contract allowing fake market address insertion, draining users' collateral

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sets an invalid market address in DebtManager contract

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sets an invalid market address in DebtManager contract
summary: Exactly Protocol was hacked due to an insufficient check in the DebtManager contract, allowing attackers to insert fake market addresses and drain users' collateral. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring and preventing the setting of invalid market addresses.
